privileged_info_summary: The task.json file contains NO metadata field. The task uses real data from Unsplash (verified URLs: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519904981063-b0cf448d479e and https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542744173-8e7e53415bb0, both returning valid JPEG images). The task is designed to apply GIMP's Despeckle filter (verified as a real, documented feature in GIMP located at Filters → Enhance → Despeckle) to reduce noise in photographs. The verification logic uses image analysis to check: (1) noise reduction of at least 15% in smooth regions, (2) edge detail preservation of at least 85%, (3) meaningful image modification (≥3% of pixels changed), and (4) prevention of over-smoothing (≥70% edge strength retained). All components are authentic and verified against authoritative sources.
